params.name: tiles
params.description: Two-dimensional tile matrix. Use Figma tile types 1 to 22; use null for an empty/off tile.

params.name: color
params.description: Default tile colour. Use brand, accent, accent-light, white, or transparent. Defaults to brand. Accent colours follow the active participant or research theme.

params.name: tileSize
params.description: CSS length for each square tile. Defaults to 120px.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the Tile Pattern root.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes to add to the Tile Pattern root.

params.name: spritePath
params.description: Path to the tile-pattern sprite. Defaults to /assets/tile-pattern/tile-pattern-sprite.svg.
